title: 10 Million View WOW Riddles (Unexpected Twists)
licenseNote: Starter questions are bundled for local video generation. Buyers can edit, replace, or extend this JSON file.

items.question: A woman hears her own voice calling from another room, but she lives alone. Nothing supernatural happened. What did she hear?
items.explanation: Her voice was captured earlier and played back, so the caller was not another person.

items.question: A man reads the final page first and immediately knows the whole story is fake. Why?
items.answer: It was a diary dated in the future
items.explanation: A diary cannot truthfully describe dates that have not happened yet.

items.question: I become more valuable when you cut me, but worthless if you break me. What am I?
items.explanation: Diamonds are cut to improve value, but breaking one ruins it.

items.question: A room is full of people, but not one person is breathing. How?
items.explanation: The people are visible, but only as an image.

items.question: I have cities but no houses, mountains but no trees, and water but no fish. What am I?
items.explanation: A map shows all three without containing the real objects.

items.question: I can repeat your words, but I never understand them. What am I?
items.explanation: An echo returns sound without thinking or speaking on its own.
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: I follow you all day, but disappear when the lights go out. What am I?
items.explanation: A shadow exists only when light is blocked by your body.
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: I show every road, but I never travel. What am I?
items.explanation: A map contains routes, but it stays still.
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: The more I work, the shorter I become. What am I?
items.explanation: A candle burns down while giving light.
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: I have keys but open no doors. What am I?
items.explanation: A keyboard has keys for typing, not locks.
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: I have hands but cannot clap. What am I?
items.explanation: Clock hands move around the face, but they are not human hands.
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: I copy your face, but I have no memory. What am I?
items.explanation: A mirror reflects only what is in front of it.
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: I travel around the world while staying in a corner. What am I?
items.explanation: A stamp stays on the corner of an envelope as it travels.
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: I run forever but never get tired. What am I?
items.explanation: A river runs continuously, but it is not alive.
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: The more you share me, the less I exist. What am I?
items.explanation: A secret stops being secret when too many people know it.
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?
